syntax_143.creator: tim740
syntax_143.title: Absolute Path
syntax_143.description:
Returns the absolute path of a string for example

"plugins/test.txt" would return
c://ect../myserver/plugins/test.txt"

en:
Returns the absolute path of a string for example

"plugins/test.txt" would return
c://ect../myserver/plugins/test.txt"

syntax_144.creator: tim740
syntax_144.title: Addon List
syntax_144.description: Gets a list of the addons on the server, this can also be used to get the number (size)

en: Gets a list of the addons on the server, this can also be used to get the number (size)

syntax_145.creator: tim740
syntax_145.title: Ascii To String
syntax_145.description: Converts Ascii (Symbol number from the ascii table) to string

en: Converts Ascii (Symbol number from the ascii table) to string

syntax_146.creator: tim740
syntax_146.title: Ascii To Unicode
syntax_146.description: Converts a single Ascii value to a Unicode value
syntax_146.syntax_pattern:
convert ascii %number% to unicode
ascii %numbers% as unicode

en: Converts a single Ascii value to a Unicode value

syntax_147.creator: tim740
syntax_147.title: Attribute of File
syntax_147.description:
Returns the value of the files attribute as a boolean

Sets a attribute of a file (read/write/hidden) to a boolean

en:
Returns the value of the files attribute as a boolean

Sets a attribute of a file (read/write/hidden) to a boolean

syntax_148.creator: tim740
syntax_148.title: Binary To Decimal
syntax_148.description: Converts a Binary string in to a decimal
syntax_148.syntax_pattern:
convert bin[ary] %string% to decimal
bin[ary] %string% as decimal

en: Converts a Binary string in to a decimal

syntax_149.creator: tim740
syntax_149.title: Binary To Hexadecimal
syntax_149.syntax_pattern:
convert bin[ary] %string% to hexa[decimal]
bin[ary] %string% as hexa[decimal]

en: Converts Binary to a Hexadecimal

syntax_150.creator: tim740
syntax_150.title: Binary To Octal
syntax_150.description: Converts Binary to an Octal Int
syntax_150.syntax_pattern:
convert bin[ary] %string% to octal
bin[ary] %string% as octal

en: Converts Binary to an Octal Int

syntax_151.creator: tim740
syntax_151.title: Binary To String
syntax_151.description: Converts Binary "01010010 01010010" ect.. in to a String (Must use spaces)

en: Converts Binary "01010010 01010010" ect.. in to a String (Must use spaces)

syntax_152.creator: tim740
syntax_152.title: Contents from URL
syntax_152.description: Gets the contents from a URL, and returns it as an array (list variable)

en: Gets the contents from a URL, and returns it as an array (list variable)
Converts a string to lowercase
Converts a string to uppercase

syntax_155.creator: tim740
syntax_155.title: Date Infomation
syntax_155.syntax_pattern:
(year|month|month name|day of year|day of month|day of week|day name|hours|minutes|seconds) from date %date%
date %date%'s (year|month|month name|day of year|day of month|day of week|day name|hours|minutes|seconds)

en: Returns Information from a date.

syntax_156.creator: tim740
syntax_156.title: Date Parsed
syntax_156.description:
Parses a string as a date, needed for %date% elements.

"dd" = Days, "MM" = Months, "yy" = Years (16), "yyyy" = Years (2016)
"HH" = Hours, "mm" = Minutes, "ss" = Seconds

en:
Parses a string as a date, needed for %date% elements.

"dd" = Days, "MM" = Months, "yy" = Years (16), "yyyy" = Years (2016)
"HH" = Hours, "mm" = Minutes, "ss" = Seconds

syntax_157.creator: tim740
syntax_157.title: Date to Unix
syntax_157.syntax_pattern:
convert date %date% to unix[ date]
date %date% as unix[ date]

en: Converts a date (like "now" to unix)

syntax_158.creator: tim740
syntax_158.title: Decimal To Binary
syntax_158.syntax_pattern:
convert decimal %number% to bin[ary]
decimal %string% as bin[ary]

en: Converts a Decimal to Binary

syntax_159.creator: tim740
syntax_159.title: Directory Size
syntax_159.description: Gets the size of a directory
syntax_159.syntax_pattern:
size of dir[ectory] %string%[ in bytes]
dir[ectory] %string%'s size[ in bytes]

en: Gets the size of a directory
Returns disk space

syntax_161.creator: tim740
syntax_161.title: Encode or Decode Base64
syntax_161.description:
Encode a string to base64 using UTF-8 as the Charset
Decode a string from base64 using UTF-8 as the Charset

en:
Encode a string to base64 using UTF-8 as the Charset
Decode a string from base64 using UTF-8 as the Charset

syntax_162.creator: tim740
syntax_162.title: Encode or Decode Morse
syntax_162.description:
Encodes a string to morse code
Decodes a morse string to a english string
syntax_162.syntax_pattern:
encode morse[ code] %string%
decode morse[ code] %string%

en:
Encodes a string to morse code
Decodes a morse string to a english string

syntax_163.creator: tim740
syntax_163.title: Encrypt or Decrypt String
syntax_163.description:
Encrypts a String if you use AES You have to use a key with the length 16, 24, 32 chars
Decrypts a String if you use AES You have to use a key with the length 16, 24, 32 chars
syntax_163.syntax_pattern:
encrypt %string% using %string% with key %string%
decrypt %string% using %string% with key %string%

en:
Encrypts a String if you use AES You have to use a key with the length 16, 24, 32 chars
Decrypts a String if you use AES You have to use a key with the length 16, 24, 32 chars

syntax_164.creator: tim740
syntax_164.title: File Contents
syntax_164.description:
Returns the contents of a file

Sets,gets or resets contents of file

en:
Returns the contents of a file

Sets,gets or resets contents of file

syntax_165.creator: tim740
syntax_165.title: File Extension
syntax_165.description: Returns the file extension of a file

en: Returns the file extension of a file

syntax_166.creator: tim740
syntax_166.title: File Last Modified, Last Accessed, Creation Date
syntax_166.description: Returns when the file was last changed (modified), last accessed, and created
syntax_166.syntax_pattern:
file %string%'s (last modified|creation|last access) value
(last modified|creation|last access) value of file %string%

en: Returns when the file was last changed (modified), last accessed, and created

syntax_167.creator: tim740
syntax_167.title: File Line Count
syntax_167.description: Returns the line count of a file
syntax_167.syntax_pattern:
line count of file %string%
file %string%'s line count

en: Returns the line count of a file

syntax_168.creator: tim740
syntax_168.title: File Name
syntax_168.description: Gets the name of a file with out the extension

en: Gets the name of a file with out the extension

syntax_169.creator: tim740
syntax_169.title: File Owner
syntax_169.description:
Gets or Sets the file owner
Note: Can only set the owner to a real user

en:
Gets or Sets the file owner
Note: Can only set the owner to a real user

syntax_170.creator: tim740
syntax_170.title: File Size
syntax_170.description: Returns the size of the file
syntax_170.syntax_pattern:
size of file %string%[ in bytes]
file %string%'s size[ in bytes]

en: Returns the size of the file

syntax_171.creator: tim740
syntax_171.title: Files in Directory
syntax_171.description: Returns a list of the files in the current and sub directories
syntax_171.syntax_pattern:
files in dir[ectory] [including sub dir[ectorie]s)] %string%
dir[ectory] [including sub dir[ectorie]s)] %string%'s files

en: Returns a list of the files in the current and sub directories

syntax_172.creator: tim740
syntax_172.title: Files in Zip File
syntax_172.description: Returns a list of files in the zip file
syntax_172.syntax_pattern:
files in zip[ file] %string%
zip[ file] %string%'s files

en: Returns a list of files in the zip file

syntax_173.creator: tim740
syntax_173.title: Hash String
syntax_173.description: Gets the Hash of the string.

en: Gets the Hash of the string.

syntax_174.creator: tim740
syntax_174.title: Hex To RGB
syntax_174.description: Converts a Hex color value in to a Rgb color value formated like "200, 200, 200"
syntax_174.syntax_pattern:
convert hex %string% to rgb
hex %string% as rgb

en: Converts a Hex color value in to a Rgb color value formated like "200, 200, 200"

syntax_175.creator: tim740
syntax_175.title: Hexadecimal to Binary
syntax_175.syntax_pattern:
convert hexa[decimal] %string% to bin[ary]
hexa[decimal] %string% as bin[ary]

en: Convert a Hexadecimal to Binary

syntax_176.creator: tim740
syntax_176.title: Hexadecimal To Number
syntax_176.description: Converts a Hexadecimal to a Number
syntax_176.syntax_pattern:
convert hexa[decimal] %string% to num[ber]
hexa[decimal] %string% as num[ber]

en: Converts a Hexadecimal to a Number

syntax_177.creator: tim740
syntax_177.title: Is Os
syntax_177.description: Checks if your server's os a certain os
syntax_177.syntax_pattern:
(operating system|os) is (windows|mac|linux|unix|solaris|sun os|hp ux|aix|irix|free bsd|open bsd|net bsd)
(operating system|os) is(n'| no)t (windows|mac|linux|unix|solaris|sun os|hp ux|aix|irix|free bsd|open bsd|net bsd)

en: Checks if your server's os a certain os

syntax_178.creator: tim740
syntax_178.title: Json Value
syntax_178.description: Gets the contents from a single json value
syntax_178.syntax_pattern:
content of json value %string% from text %-string%
value %string%'s json contents from text %-string%

en: Gets the contents from a single json value

syntax_179.creator: tim740
syntax_179.title: Json Values
syntax_179.description: Gets the contents from a multiple json value's
syntax_179.syntax_pattern:
content of json value's %strings% from text %-string%
value's %strings%'s json contents from text %-string%

en: Gets the contents from a multiple json value's

syntax_180.creator: tim740
syntax_180.title: Last Execute command Output
syntax_180.description: Returns the last bash/batch/sh command's output

en: Returns the last bash/batch/sh command's output

syntax_181.creator: tim740
syntax_181.title: Line from URL
syntax_181.description: Gets a line from a URL and returns it.

en: Gets a line from a URL and returns it.

syntax_182.creator: tim740
syntax_182.title: List of TimeZones
syntax_182.description: Returns an array (list variable) of all the supported TimeZones.

en: Returns an array (list variable) of all the supported TimeZones.

syntax_183.creator: tim740
syntax_183.title: Loaded Commands
syntax_183.description: Returns Loaded Commands as a number

en: Returns Loaded Commands as a number

syntax_184.creator: tim740
syntax_184.title: Loaded Conditions
syntax_184.description: Returns loaded conditions from all addons and skript

en: Returns loaded conditions from all addons and skript

syntax_185.creator: tim740
syntax_185.title: Loaded Effects
syntax_185.description: Returns loaded effects from all addons and skript

en: Returns loaded effects from all addons and skript

syntax_186.creator: tim740
syntax_186.title: Loaded Events
syntax_186.description: Returns the number of events from all addon and skript

en: Returns the number of events from all addon and skript

syntax_187.description: Returns loaded Expressions from all addons and skript

syntax_188.creator: tim740
syntax_188.title: Loaded Functions
syntax_188.description: Returns loaded Functions as a number

en: Returns loaded Functions as a number

syntax_189.creator: tim740
syntax_189.title: Loaded Scripts
syntax_189.description: Returns loaded skripts as a number

en: Returns loaded skripts as a number

syntax_190.creator: tim740
syntax_190.title: Loaded Statements
syntax_190.description: Returns the number of loaded statements

en: Returns the number of loaded statements

syntax_191.creator: tim740
syntax_191.title: Loaded Triggers
syntax_191.description: Returns Loaded Triggers as a numbers

en: Returns Loaded Triggers as a numbers

syntax_192.creator: tim740
syntax_192.title: Loaded Variables
syntax_192.description: Returns loaded variables as a number

en: Returns loaded variables as a number

syntax_193.creator: tim740
syntax_193.title: Mirror String
syntax_193.description:
Reverses a string
Example "hello" would turn in to "olleh"

en:
Reverses a string
Example "hello" would turn in to "olleh"

syntax_194.creator: tim740
syntax_194.title: Number Of Chars
syntax_194.description: Returns the number of upper or lower case chars in a string

en: Returns the number of upper or lower case chars in a string

syntax_195.creator: tim740
syntax_195.title: Number To Hexadecimal
syntax_195.description: Converts a Number to it's Hexadecimal Form
syntax_195.syntax_pattern:
convert num[ber] %number% to hexa[decimal]
num[ber] %number% as hexa[decimal]

en: Converts a Number to it's Hexadecimal Form

syntax_196.creator: tim740
syntax_196.title: Octal To Binary
syntax_196.description: Converts an Octal Int to it's binary form
syntax_196.syntax_pattern:
convert octal %string% to bin[ary]
octal %string% as bin[ary]

en: Converts an Octal Int to it's binary form

syntax_197.creator: tim740
syntax_197.title: Plugin List
syntax_197.description: Gets a list of the plugin on the server, this can also be used to get the number (size)

en: Gets a list of the plugin on the server, this can also be used to get the number (size)
Returns free/total/max ram
Randomizes a string

syntax_200.creator: tim740
syntax_200.title: Read Line in File
syntax_200.description: Reads a line in a file

en: Reads a line in a file

syntax_201.creator: tim740
syntax_201.title: Region of Server
syntax_201.description:
Returns the region of the server.

Example: "Europe/London"

en:
Returns the region of the server.

Example: "Europe/London"

syntax_202.creator: tim740
syntax_202.title: Relative Path
syntax_202.description: Gets the relative path of a file

en: Gets the relative path of a file

syntax_203.creator: tim740
syntax_203.title: RGB to Hex
syntax_203.description: Converts a rgb color to a hex color
syntax_203.syntax_pattern:
convert rgb %number, %number, %number to hex
rgb %number%, %number%, %number% as hex

en: Converts a rgb color to a hex color

syntax_204.creator: tim740
syntax_204.title: Short Path
syntax_204.description: Returns short path of a path

en: Returns short path of a path

syntax_206.creator: tim740
syntax_206.title: SSL Algorithm
syntax_206.syntax_pattern:
ssl algorithm of url %string%
url %string%'s ssl algorithm

en: Return's the SSL Certificate's Algorithm

syntax_207.creator: tim740
syntax_207.title: SSL Expire Value
syntax_207.description: Returns the SSL Certificate's Expire date as a unix timestamp
syntax_207.syntax_pattern:
ssl expire value of url %string%
url %string%'s ssl expire value

en: Returns the SSL Certificate's Expire date as a unix timestamp

syntax_208.creator: tim740
syntax_208.title: SSL Issue Value
syntax_208.description: Returns the SSL Certificate's Issue Date as a unix timestamp
syntax_208.syntax_pattern:
ssl issue value of url %string%
url %string%'s ssl issue value

en: Returns the SSL Certificate's Issue Date as a unix timestamp

syntax_209.creator: tim740
syntax_209.title: SSL Serial Number
syntax_209.description: Returns the SSL Certificate's Serial Number as a hexadecimal
syntax_209.syntax_pattern:
ssl serial number of url %string%
url %string%'s ssl serial number

en: Returns the SSL Certificate's Serial Number as a hexadecimal

syntax_210.creator: tim740
syntax_210.title: SSL Verifier
syntax_210.description:
Returns the SSL signer/verifier of a url
Example: DigiCert
syntax_210.syntax_pattern:
ssl verifier of url %string%
url %string%'s ssl verifier

en:
Returns the SSL signer/verifier of a url
Example: DigiCert

syntax_211.creator: tim740
syntax_211.title: SSL Version
syntax_211.description:
Returns SSL Certifiicate's Version as a Number
Example: 3
syntax_211.syntax_pattern:
ssl version of url %string%
url %string%'s ssl version

en:
Returns SSL Certifiicate's Version as a Number
Example: 3

syntax_212.creator: tim740
syntax_212.title: String To Ascii
syntax_212.description: Converts Text or symbols in to it's number on the ascii table

en: Converts Text or symbols in to it's number on the ascii table
Converts a String to Binary

syntax_214.creator: tim740
syntax_214.title: String to Unicode
syntax_214.description: Converts text (char) to Unicode, accepts more than one char input

en: Converts text (char) to Unicode, accepts more than one char input

syntax_215.creator: tim740
syntax_215.title: System Property
syntax_215.syntax_pattern: system property (os arch|os name|os version|java home|user dir|user home|user name|user lang[uage]|user timezone|line separator|file separator|path separator|file encoding)

en: Return a System Property

syntax_216.creator: tim740
syntax_216.title: System Time
syntax_216.description: Returns current System nanoseconds, milliseconds or seconds

en: Returns current System nanoseconds, milliseconds or seconds

syntax_217.creator: tim740
syntax_217.title: Time In TimeZone
syntax_217.description:
Gets the current time In a TimeZone, support for GMT+1,GMT-1 ect..
formatted just like your config is, Case Sensitive!

en:
Gets the current time In a TimeZone, support for GMT+1,GMT-1 ect..
formatted just like your config is, Case Sensitive!

syntax_218.creator: tim740
syntax_218.title: TimeZone of server
syntax_218.description:
Returns the TimeZone of the server.

Example: GMT

en:
Returns the TimeZone of the server.

Example: GMT

syntax_219.creator: tim740
syntax_219.title: Unicode To Ascii
syntax_219.description: Converts unicode (/u2588) to Ascii (9608), Accepts more than one input
syntax_219.syntax_pattern:
convert unicode %string% to ascii
unicode %string% as ascii

en: Converts unicode (/u2588) to Ascii (9608), Accepts more than one input
Converts string tounicode

syntax_221.creator: tim740
syntax_221.title: Unix To Date
syntax_221.description: Converts a Unix date to a normal date formatted like just like you have it set in skript's config!
syntax_221.syntax_pattern:
convert unix[ date] %number% to date
unix[ date] %number% as date

en: Converts a Unix date to a normal date formatted like just like you have it set in skript's config!

syntax_222.creator: tim740
syntax_222.title: Unix To Date Formatted
syntax_222.description:
Converts a unix date to a date formatted how you want!

"dd" = Days, "MM" = Months, "yy" = Years (16), "yyyy" = Years (2016)
"HH" = Hours, "mm" = Minutes, "ss" = Seconds
syntax_222.syntax_pattern:
convert unix[ date] %number% to date formatted as %string%
unix[ date] %number% as date formatted as %string%

en:
Converts a unix date to a date formatted how you want!

"dd" = Days, "MM" = Months, "yy" = Years (16), "yyyy" = Years (2016)
"HH" = Hours, "mm" = Minutes, "ss" = Seconds

syntax_223.creator: tim740
syntax_223.title: URL Last Modified
syntax_223.description: Gets the page's last modified date and returns as a unix timestamp
syntax_223.syntax_pattern:
last modified value of url %string%
url %string%'s last modified value

en: Gets the page's last modified date and returns as a unix timestamp

syntax_224.creator: tim740
syntax_224.title: URL Line Count
syntax_224.description: Returns the line count from a web page (url)
syntax_224.syntax_pattern:
line count of url %string%
url %string%'s line count

en: Returns the line count from a web page (url)

syntax_225.creator: tim740
syntax_225.title: URL Online State
syntax_225.description: Checks the online state of a webpage/site and returns true if it's up
syntax_225.syntax_pattern:
online stat(us|e) of url %string%
url %string%'s online stat(us|e)

en: Checks the online state of a webpage/site and returns true if it's up

syntax_226.creator: tim740
syntax_226.title: URL Response Code
syntax_226.description:
Returns the response code from a url (web page)
Example: 200 (OK), 404 (Not Found/Offline)
Full List: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_HTTP_status_codes
syntax_226.syntax_pattern:
response code of url %string%
url %string%'s response code

en:
Returns the response code from a url (web page)
Example: 200 (OK), 404 (Not Found/Offline)
Full List: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_HTTP_status_codes

syntax_227.creator: tim740
syntax_227.title: URL Size
syntax_227.description: Returns the size of a web page (from url)
syntax_227.syntax_pattern:
size of url %string%[ in bytes]
url %string%'s size[ in bytes]

en: Returns the size of a web page (from url)

syntax_228.creator: tim740
syntax_228.title: Version
syntax_228.description: Returns the version of plugin, java, server, os, or my aliases version

en: Returns the version of plugin, java, server, os, or my aliases version

syntax_230.creator: tim740
syntax_230.title: On Command Run
syntax_230.description: Triggers when you execute bash/batch/sh code

en: Triggers when you execute bash/batch/sh code

syntax_231.creator: tim740
syntax_231.title: On File Copy
syntax_231.description:
Executes every time you try to copy a file to a directory, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get file to copy
Use: event-string to get directory to copy to

en:
Executes every time you try to copy a file to a directory, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get file to copy
Use: event-string to get directory to copy to

syntax_232.creator: tim740
syntax_232.title: On File Creation
syntax_232.description:
Executes every time you try to create a file, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get file

en:
Executes every time you try to create a file, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get file

syntax_233.creator: tim740
syntax_233.title: On File Deletion
syntax_233.description:
Executes every time you try to delete a file, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get the file

en:
Executes every time you try to delete a file, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get the file

syntax_234.creator: tim740
syntax_234.title: On File Download
syntax_234.description:
Executes every time you try to download, this can be cancelled
Use: event-string to get URL
Use: event-file to file download name

en:
Executes every time you try to download, this can be cancelled
Use: event-string to get URL
Use: event-file to file download name

syntax_235.creator: tim740
syntax_235.title: On File Execute
syntax_235.description:
Executes every time you try to run a file, this can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get file

en:
Executes every time you try to run a file, this can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get file

syntax_236.creator: tim740
syntax_236.title: On File Move
syntax_236.description:
Executes every time you try to move a file, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get the file
Use: event-string to get the new location

en:
Executes every time you try to move a file, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get the file
Use: event-string to get the new location

syntax_237.creator: tim740
syntax_237.title: On File Rename

Executes every time you try to rename a file, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get the file
Use: event-string to get the new name

Executes every time you try to rename a file, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get the file
Use: event-string to get the new name

Executes every time you try to wipe a file, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get file

Executes every time you try to wipe a file, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get file

syntax_239.description:
Executes every time you try to rename a file, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get the file
Use: event-string to get the string to be written
Use: event-number to get the line number

en:
Executes every time you try to rename a file, can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get the file
Use: event-string to get the string to be written
Use: event-number to get the line number

Executes every time you try to zip a file can be cancelled
Use: event-file to get the file
Use: event-string to get the zip

Executes every time you try to zip a file can be cancelled

Use: event-string to get the zip

Executes every time you try to unzip a file can be cancelled

Use: event-string to get the unzip to location

en: Copies a directory and all sub-directories to another directory

syntax_247.description: Deletes a file at the location you give it

en: Deletes a file at the location you give it

syntax_248.creator: tim740
syntax_248.title: Download File
syntax_248.description: Downloads a File from a url

en: Downloads a File from a url

syntax_250.creator: tim740
syntax_250.title: Move Directory
syntax_250.description: Moves a directory to another directory

en: Moves a directory to another directory

syntax_251.creator: tim740
syntax_251.title: Move File
syntax_251.description: Moves a file to the location you tell it to

en: Moves a file to the location you tell it to
Reloads skripts aliases

syntax_253.creator: tim740
syntax_253.title: Reload Config
syntax_253.description: Reloads a config of a plugin

en: Reloads a config of a plugin
Reloads a script

syntax_255.creator: tim740
syntax_255.title: Reload Server
syntax_255.description: Reloads the server (This can be unsafe for most plugins)

en: Reloads the server (This can be unsafe for most plugins)
Renames the chosen directory
Renames a file
Restarts the server using spigot

syntax_259.creator: tim740
syntax_259.title: Run As Op
syntax_259.description: Forces the player to run a command as op

en: Forces the player to run a command as op

syntax_260.creator: tim740
syntax_260.title: Run Command
syntax_260.description: Execute bash/batch/sh commands in skript #Windows: cmd /c

en: Execute bash/batch/sh commands in skript #Windows: cmd /c

syntax_261.creator: tim740
syntax_261.title: Run Script/File
syntax_261.description:
Runs the script (.bat / .sh / ect..) at /plugins + your string (path)
or you can run programs/files

en:
Runs the script (.bat / .sh / ect..) at /plugins + your string (path)
or you can run programs/files
Unzip's a zip file

syntax_264.creator: tim740
syntax_264.title: Write Line in file
syntax_264.description: Changes a line in a file to the text you want it to have! #note this could wipe the file! (Very low chance)
syntax_264.syntax_pattern:
set line %number% in file %string% to %string%
set file %string%'s line %number% to %string%

en: Changes a line in a file to the text you want it to have! #note this could wipe the file! (Very low chance)

syntax_265.creator: tim740
syntax_265.title: Zip Directory
syntax_265.description: Add's a directory to a zip file with all the files and folders in that directory

en: Add's a directory to a zip file with all the files and folders in that directory

syntax_266.creator: tim740
syntax_266.title: Zip Files
syntax_266.description: Creates a new zip and adds a file to it, if that zip already exists it will create a new one! (Don't worry it doesn't overwrite)

en: Creates a new zip and adds a file to it, if that zip already exists it will create a new one! (Don't worry it doesn't overwrite)

syntax_267.creator: tim740
syntax_267.title: File Exists
syntax_267.description: Checks if the file exists or doesn't exist

en: Checks if the file exists or doesn't exist

syntax_268.creator: tim740
syntax_268.title: Is a Directory
syntax_268.description: Checks if a path is a Directory
syntax_268.syntax_pattern:
file %string% is a dir[ectory]
file %string% is(n'| no)t a dir[ectory]

en: Checks if a path is a Directory

syntax_269.creator: tim740
syntax_269.title: Is a File
syntax_269.description:
Checks if the path is a file or a directory

Useful for loops
syntax_269.syntax_pattern:
file %string% is a file
file %string% is(n't| not) a file

en:
Checks if the path is a file or a directory

Useful for loops

syntax_270.creator: tim740
syntax_270.title: Is Executable
syntax_270.description: Checks if a file is executable
syntax_270.syntax_pattern:
file %string% is exec[utable]
file %string% is(n't| not) exec[utable]

en: Checks if a file is executable

syntax_271.creator: tim740
syntax_271.title: Is Symbolic
syntax_271.description: Checks if the file has a link with another file (example shortcut)

en: Checks if the file has a link with another file (example shortcut)

syntax_272.creator: tim740
syntax_272.title: Is TimeZone
syntax_272.description: Checks if the server is a certain TimeZone.
syntax_272.syntax_pattern:
server is time[ ]zone %string%
server is(n't| no)t time[ ]zone %string%

en: Checks if the server is a certain TimeZone.

syntax_273.creator: tim740
syntax_273.title: String Ends With
syntax_273.description: Checks if a string ends with a certain string
syntax_273.syntax_pattern:
%string% ends with %-string%
%string% does(n't| not) end with %-string%

en: Checks if a string ends with a certain string

syntax_274.creator: tim740
syntax_274.title: String Starts With
syntax_274.description: Checks if a string starts with a certain string
syntax_274.syntax_pattern:
%string% starts with %-string%
%string% does(n't| not) start with %-string%

en: Checks if a string starts with a certain string

syntax_275.creator: tim740
syntax_275.title: Yaml Exists
syntax_275.description: Checks if a yaml path exists within a yaml file.
syntax_275.syntax_pattern:
y[a]ml[ path] %string% in file %-string% exists
y[a]ml[ path] %string% in file %-string% does(n't| not) exist

en: Checks if a yaml path exists within a yaml file.

syntax_229.creator: tim740
syntax_229.title: Yaml (skUtilities)
syntax_229.description:
Everything to do with yaml in skUtilities
Read/write/delete/remove
(%object% can be a string/boolean/number)
syntax_229.syntax_pattern:
y[a]ml value %string% (from|of) file %string%
set y[a]ml value %string% (from|of) file %string% to %object%
delete y[a]ml value %string% (from|of) file %string%
y[a]ml nodes %string% (from|of) file %-string%
add %object% to y[a]ml nodes %string% (from|of) file %string%
remove %object% from y[a]ml nodes %string% (from|of) file %string%
delete y[a]ml nodes %string% (from|of) file %string%
y[a]ml node[s with] keys %string% (from|of) file %-string%
add %object% to y[a]ml node[s with] keys %string% (from|of) file %string%
remove %object% from y[a]ml node[s with] keys %string% (from|of) file %string%
delete y[a]ml node[s with] keys %string% (from|of) file %string%
y[a]ml list %string% (from|of) file %-string%
add %object% to y[a]ml list %string% (from|of) file %string%
remove %object% from y[a]ml list %string% (from|of) file %string%
delete y[a]ml list %string% (from|of) file %string%

en:
Everything to do with yaml in skUtilities
Read/write/delete/remove
(%object% can be a string/boolean/number)

syntax_249.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_249.title: Insert Line
syntax_249.description:
Inserts a line of text at the given location in the given file, you can write to non-existant lines it will create empty lines for the ones before.
use the [Write Line in File](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=264) effect if you want to create a new line, only use insert line if you need to put a line between some lines or add a new line to a file

en:
Inserts a line of text at the given location in the given file, you can write to non-existant lines it will create empty lines for the ones before.
use the [Write Line in File](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=264) effect if you want to create a new line, only use insert line if you need to put a line between some lines or add a new line to a file
